summary: Comprehensive testing of BIG Hat Entertainment Hub SSO platform completed successfully. All backend APIs, frontend components, admin functionality, and authentication flows working correctly.
passed_tests: API health check endpoint (/api/health)
Master admin login with correct credentials (Sellards@bighat.live)
Authentication verification (/api/auth/me)
User management APIs (get users, create user)
Event management APIs (get events, get unclaimed events, create event, claim event)
Protected route security (401 without authentication)
Logout functionality
Login page loads with proper redirect from protected routes
Login form validation (empty fields, invalid credentials)
Dashboard loads with welcome message and user name
Header displays correct role badge (Master Admin)
Chyron bar shows unclaimed events with functional claim buttons
Three app cards visible (Trivia, Music Bingo, Karaoke with Coming Soon)
Schedule section displays upcoming events
Resources section shows all tool categories (Trivia Tools, Bingo Tools, Socials, Business)
Admin page accessible from header dropdown for admin users
Admin user management - add user form and user creation
Admin event management - add event form and event creation
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
Dark navy + gold color scheme implemented correctly
JWT authentication with httpOnly cookies + localStorage fallback
Role-based access control working properly
